contract_summary: Acquires a reference on the cache's unbind_pincount, preventing the cache from being unbound while the reference is held. This function is unconditional and always succeeds. The caller must later release this reference by calling the corresponding put function (e.g., cachefiles_put_unbind_pincount) when the operation requiring the cache to remain bound completes. No lock or RCU protection is required to call this function; the refcount increment is atomic.
